asset.title: L6 Long Horizon
asset.purpose: Silent workflow preview generated from app captures or trace replays. Judge whether it communicates the workflow and gate clearly.

judge.summary: An excellent, highly legible step-by-step trace replay demonstrating an AI agent resolving write conflicts on a financial table using CAS and context compaction.

featureClarity.evidence: Shows step-by-step execution of an AI agent resolving conflicts and writing to a financial table.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Demonstrates the entire sequence from initial state through multiple read/conflict/write cycles to completion.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark UI with clear row highlights and a progress indicator at the bottom.

consistency.evidence: Aligns with the spreadsheet/table interface and AI agent execution trace concept.

evidenceQuality.evidence: High-fidelity trace replay showing actual state transitions and agent logs.

legibility.evidence: High contrast text and clear labels make it easy to follow the sequence.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant for demonstrating robust multi-agent coordination over financial models.

productionHonesty.evidence: Clearly displays conflicts and CAS retries rather than a perfect happy path.

observedEvidence: Financial table with Revenue, COGS, Gross Profit, Net Income
Conflict resolution and CAS write retries
judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Watch NodeRoom's AI agent navigate a long-horizon task, resolving edit conflicts on a financial model using CAS (Compare-And-Swap) and context compaction without locking the sheet.
